designGoal: Complete the bartender roster and make the first five customers memorable at gameplay thumbnail size without revealing scoring answers.
sharedPrompt: Premium painterly stylized realism; elegant modern art-deco neighborhood cocktail bar; warm 3200K key from upper left, cool cyan-blue rim from camera right, soft burgundy fill, detailed navy shadows; central 80 percent safe zone; fictional adults 21 or older; no celebrity likeness; no text, brands, logos, watermarks, signatures, frames, or UI.
